title: Bridge Essay: Mysteries of hypnosis and the self are revealed by the psychology and neuroscien

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Mysteries of hypnosis and the self are revealed by the psychology and neuroscience of empathy.** — Am J Clin Hypn. PMID: 25928682. DOI: 10.1080/00029157.2014.978495. This article reviews agrowing body of research and theory in hypnosis and neuroscience that supports the empathic involvement theory (EIT) of hypnosis. The EIT is aunified transpersonal theory of hypnosis and the self, which weaves together empathic elements of Dzogchen, neodissociative, neuroscience, psychoanalytic, sociocognitive, and other theories by proposing that hypnotic phenomena are inherently charact...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 16 (Visionary Cosmologies). Evaluation: Marginal (score=1.7)
